judgment.summary: Zscaler shows strong revenue growth and free cash flow but remains unprofitable with a high forward P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Revenue growth 25.9% YoY — indicates strong market adoption.
Free cash flow $1.02B TTM — positive cash generation despite net loss.
Forward P/E 37.36x — reflects high growth expectations.
Consensus is strong buy with a high mean target price.
negatives: Operating margin -6.2% and Profit margin -2.3% — the company is not yet profitable.
Return on equity -3.6% and Return on assets -1.4% — negative returns on capital.
Debt/Equity 85.00 — leverage is notable, though offset by substantial cash.
Price/Sales 9.17x — valuation is high, pricing in significant future growth.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines to guide the way, Zscaler's (ZS) price action will likely be driven by its upcoming earnings report on May 26th. Investors will be looking for continued strong revenue growth and positive commentary on customer acquisition and retention, especially given the company's current unprofitability. The market will also be watching for any signs of a path towards profitability or sustained free cash flow generation.
